Kyoko grabbed a handful of mud that was dyed with blood and took a whiff, before looking around. She frowned and said, "This Type 5 Diplodocus seemed to have been gravely injured, and laid here. However, it suddenly recovered for some strange reason and left."

Luo Qing Qing arched her brows, and came to a scarily accurate guess, "Type 5 Diplodocus? The Sun Alliance actually dared set their sights on it. They truly do not know the vastness of the heavens and earth. Even if a Type 5 Mutant Beast was heavily injured, it would be able to destroy any one of our headquarters."

chapters.title: Chapter 811: The Entrance Of Storm Valley!
chapters.body:
Chapter 811: The Entrance Of Storm Valley!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Another member of the guard, a tall and smart-looking beauty asked with a frown, "Your Majesty, how could you tell that it was the Sun Alliance?"

"The only ones who could possibly injure a Type 5 Mutant Beast can only be us 3 hegemons. Since it was not our Storm Valley, that leaves the Sun Alliance and the Pterosaur Mountain. Knowing those guys from the Pterosaur Mountain, they would not do something like that without being absolutely confident. They’re too careful and pragmatic. From the trail of the Type 5 Diplodocus, it is very likely from the direction of the Sun Alliance City."

"Shinya Takahiko is truly a despicable person. Seeing that he couldn’t handle this Type 5 Diplodocus himself, he actually chose to lure it here to our Storm Valley. This debt, I will definitely collect it personally!" Luo Qing Qing gnashed her teeth as she ordered out with an overbearing tone, "Yin Ji!"

A petite girl of only about 1.25 meter stood out, her loli face full of respect, "Your subject is here!"

Luo Qing Qing gave a simple but cruel order, "Go investigate the Sun City! If there’s a chance, get the heads of 2 of their generals."

"Yes! Your Majesty!"

The lady who looked even smaller and younger than a girl replied in a clear and bright tone, before disappearing from her spot.

The other smart-looking lady suddenly spoke, "Your Majesty, there is one more power that actually possesses the capability to contend with a Type 5 Mutant Beast."

Luo Qing Qing arched her brows as she responded, "Ying Lan, you mean the faction in Vulture Valley under Yue Zhong?"

Ying Lan nodded, "That man called Yue Zhong, is between the age of 21 to 25. He had suddenly appeared in Shao Village, before swallowing the Vulture Tribe and Velociraptor Tribe. Just recently, the troops sent by the Sun Alliance to attack him were annihilated by him. He is rumored to have 2 Type 4 experts and had gained a number of the Sun Armor to boost his own forces. They should be capable of attacking a Type 5 Mutant Beast as well."

Luo Qing Qing nodded in agreement, "That’s true. However, it’s not possible for Yue Zhong to know of this Type 5 Diplodocus intel. Only a number of us from the 3 factions knew about this. It’s unlikely that it’s him."

Ying Lan also nodded in agreement, "That’s true. That intelligence was obtained at a huge cost. He might not have gotten wind about it so quickly."

The injured Type 5 Diplodocus was discovered by the Sun Alliance, however, the Storm Valley and Pterosaur Mountain had paid a large price to obtain this information through their spies. However, the Type 5 Mutant Beast was too terrifying, hence, no one actually gathered a force to hunt it down.

Luo Qing Qing frowned and challenged, "However, this Yue Zhong person is truly someone else, to be able to achieve so much in such a short time. Ying Lan, I’ll leave the information gathering to you."

Yue Zhong’s meteoric rise caused even Luo Qing Qing to feel a little threatened. Although she was confident in herself and proud, she was not stupid. She never underestimated her enemies and would use all she had to crush her foes. This was the reason why she had never lost.

Ying Lan nodded slightly, "Yes! Your Majesty!"

The remaining 7 elite personal guards continued to scour the area for clues, however, it was to no avail.

"Let’s go back!"

Under her orders, her personal guards left together with her.

The 200 other Storm Valley Warriors quickly followed behind as they left the forest.

Once the Queen and her party left, Willianna heaved a sigh of relief, nudging Yue Zhong with unkind intentions, cackling, "Let’s move! Yue Zhong!!"

Yue Zhong did not seem to mind as he strolled alongside her, he was after all, curious about Storm Valley.

A man’s physique was naturally stronger than a woman. Of course, there were some exceptions. In this plane, where dinosaurs, Mutant Beasts, prehistoric life forms and other Mutant Bugs were rampant, it was hard for a woman to establish an entire faction on their own.

Once a woman tried to establish a faction, it would usually be swallowed by a nearby male-dominated faction.

Luo Qing Qing had actually managed to raise this Storm Valley in the Green Region, it was an impressive thing.

"So this is the entrance of Storm Valley?"

Yue Zhong gazed at the entrance of Storm Valley and was taken aback.

Right in front of his eyes, the so-called entrance of the Storm Valley was a cliff that was buffeted by hurricanes without stop. A number of long iron chains connected their end to the cliff on the opposite side. As the winds howled around them, one would easily lose his or her nerve just by looking out.

One by one, the female warriors got on the long metal chains, braving the storm to climb towards the other end.

As the winds blew around them, even the elites of the Storm Valley had to be careful. They took their time, on one occasion, one particular female warrior was almost blown off. Fortunately, the captain was able to grab her in the nick of time, preventing her death.

Willianna stared at Yue Zhong with an evil smile, "Are you scared? Only the fearless can get past this natural ‘city wall’ to enter our Storm Valley."

Yue Zhong held out his hands that were bound tightly and asked nonchalantly, "Well then, let me ask, how do you expect me to get across?"

In return, Willianna revealed a smug smile, as though it was all happening according to plan, "This is a small problem, however, don’t worry, I’ll take you across!"

After that, she pulled out a long Mutant Beast tendon, attaching it to his cuffs, and pulled on it, "Let’s go! Even if you fall, I can drag you up!"

The chain was a tough one to navigate even with all 4 limbs on it, evidently, Willianna was trying to make a fool out of Yue Zhong.

With a grin, Yue Zhong hopped lightly onto the chain, his Dark Dou Qi gathering silently at his soles, sticking tightly to the chain. He then walked on it as though he was walking on normal ground.

"Wow!"

"This man is not simple!"

"He must be an expert!"

"..."

A few of the female warriors saw how easily Yue Zhong was maneuvering the chain, their eyes lighting up with interest.

As men were attracted to beautiful and sexy women, women were also likewise attracted to those handsome, clean, talented and wealthy or men of authority.

In this world, the strong was more revered than looks.

The female warrior that had appeared before Yue Zhong earlier together with Willianna stepped up, watching his back and licking her lips, "Willianna, this Yue Zhong is interesting! I like him very much! How about I give you 10 handsome men in exchange for him?"

Willianna immediately rejected, "No way! He’s my prey! Kawashima Reiko, I’m warning you, he’s the prey I caught."

Kawashima Reiko’s eyes flashed with a lustful glint, "He was found by the two of us, we should be sharing him! Why not, let’s enjoy him between the both of us? He’s so strong, his taste and stamina must be good!!"

Willianna shot her a cold glare, "I can give you a Type 2 Nucleus as compensation. He’s my prey, I naturally don’t like sharing my prey with others. If you’re not willing, we can head over to the arena to determine who owns him!"

Kawashima Reiko’s eyes flashed with regret, "Ah well, forget it. However, I hope to see the Type 2 Nucleus in my hands within 3 days."

"En!" Willianna snorted in agreement. She could not bear the sight of this wanton woman.

Kawashima Reiko also shot her an icy glare, however, it disappeared quickly.

"Let’s go!"

Seeing Yue Zhong about halfway across, the female warriors of the Storm Valley quickly got on their individual chains and began to climb.

Willianna stood at the edge of the cliff, staring down at the bottomless abyss, in contrast with Yue Zhong walking with ease, and her face fell. However, she gritted her teeth and hurried to climb.

She only had a strength of a Type 2 Divine Warrior, thus, there was a limit to how fast she could proceed. Without the hurricane, she might be fast, however, since the natural element was roaring furiously, she had to be careful.

"What’re you looking at?! There’s nothing to be smug about! Move!" Willianna saw Yue Zhong loitering around at the other end, smiling at her. Thinking back to her words, her face turned red as though someone had given her a good face-smacking. She barked out loud in order to mask her embarrassment, before storming deeper towards the city.

Yue Zhong watched her furious expression and chuckled lightly before following her.

Once they passed the hurricane, the city of Storm Valley was different. Inside, it was peaceful and warm, and there was lush greenery everywhere.

chapters.title: Chapter 812: Beautiful Willianna!
chapters.body:
Chapter 812: Beautiful Willianna!

Chapter 812: Beautiful Willianna!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Many trees stood tall, each over dozens and hundreds of meters. Such trees were rare on Earth, however, they grew aplenty in this Storm Valley.

Atop the trees, there were strange fruits, each of them not existent on Earth, However, their shapes and colors were pretty similar to those from Earth.

A large number of men were dressed in simple clothing, carrying buckets to water the trees, apply fertilizer and to weed out bugs. They were overseen by a few burly and powerful-looking female soldiers wielding spears and whips, as they eyed the men coldly.

Young girls and ladies were running around the fields, practicing shooting, archery and other forms of training. As for the boys and young men, they were being taught by male teachers in the fields of textiles, farming, arithmetic and other forms of knowledge.

Many stone houses littered the plains of Storm Valley, each of them carrying a distinct style about themselves. The houses were also spaced neatly apart, giving a clean and fresh feel.

Along the streets of Storm Valley, there were many groups of people walking around. Men were peddling goods and snacks on the streets as vendors, while women were largely carrying weapons and sauntering around.

Behind many of these female warriors, there would be 2 or even 3 handsome and fair men, some even had a couple of guys and girls who were bickering.

The entire place seemed to be bustling with activity and vitality. The only difference would be that it was the exact opposite of a patriarchal society. In this Storm Valley, the women were the ones who fought and battled, thus, they held the power. Men were in charge of everything else. In fact, many of the men here had a slight sissy air about them, with no sense of manliness whatsoever.

Yue Zhong sighed as he admired the scenery, "This Luo Qing Qing is truly capable!"

In the apocalypse on Earth, Yue Zhong had come across his fair share of female-dominated factions. In those places, some focused on accepting only women and girls. Some would ostracize men, and denounce them. Some even went to the extreme, killing any men they saw or taking them as slaves.

To Yue Zhong, most of these factions were doomed to fail as they had limited expansive potential. Or, some other faction would come around and swallow them. After all, reproduction was not possible with just women alone. Furthermore, those who went out of their way to hunt men were hunted instead. There were indeed capable and numerous female experts. However, in terms of absolute strength and power, men numbered more and held the advantage due to their physique.

However, in this Storm Valley, Luo Qing Qing did none of the above, instead, using education and other forms of indoctrination to flip the roles of men and women. Making use of the men, while retaining the power of the women, the entire Storm Valley was managed well, a testimony to the capabilities of this Queen.

Willianne grinned proudly, "What do you think? Our Storm Valley is amazing, isn’t it? Compared to the Sun Alliance and Pterosaur Mountain, while our numbers are lesser, we are the most united. Our people are happy and lead a blissful life. There’s enough food and we’re protected from the external dangers. It’s almost a heaven on earth."

Yue Zhong exclaimed, "It truly is decent!"

The scenery of Storm Valley was beautiful, food was abundant. Compared to the Earth before the apocalypse, it was just lacking a truly modern city feel. However, in such a world where Mutant Beasts and Dino-people were everywhere, it was practically paradise.

Willianna heard his heartfelt praise and the corners of her mouth lifted in pleasure.

"It’s here, see you guys!"

As they came to a small garden with a 3m-tall bungalow, Willianna bid the other female warriors goodbye and led Yue Zhong into her residence.

The room was clean and tidy, with a fragrant scent. Outside the room, there were plenty of flowers planted.

Willianna slumped down on her couch that was covered with a dozen beast pelt, stretching herself as she looked at Yue Zhong coyly, "You should be able to set yourself free eh? It’s your choice to remain tied, however, don’t you find that meaningless?"

Yue Zhong chuckled, and with a thought, a sliver of Devil Flame came to life in his palm, burning through the Type 3 Beast tendon, breaking it apart.

He then sat comfortably opposite her, and asked while grinning, "When did you notice?"

She looked straight at him with satisfaction, "Don’t take me for a fool. You were able to walk alongside us without fear even after being tied up, and you could get past our Storm Valley entrance. One look and anyone can tell that you’re not simple. However, the fact that you could undo the Type 3 Beast tendon so easily surpassed my expectations. I’m even more interested in you now."

She stared at Yue Zhong, "Speak, who are you? What did you come in here for?"

Yue Zhong replied, "I’m Yue Zhong, I really lost my way. Following you here was because I was curious about the Storm Valley."

She pondered a while before giving up, "Yue Zhong? Never heard of you before."

Yue Zhong’s accomplishments in the recent days had only been made known to the upper echelons of the Storm Valley only recently as well. In this world where information was backward, it was not as easy to keep track of information as compared to Earth.

Willianna was only a low-ranking soldier, thus she did not know about Yue Zhong.

She scooted over towards his side, her eyes lit with allure as she hugged his arms and flirted, "Hey! Yue Zhong, I like you a lot, be my man!"

Yue Zhong looked at this beautiful warrior and was taken aback, "Me? Why me? Aren’t there plenty of other better-looking men than me out there?"

The number of handsome men was truly astounding, Yue Zhong had no choice but to admit, many of those sissies out there were truly better looking than him. At the same time, they would look at Willianna with respect, admiration, some even dared to leer. As long as she beckoned, they would immediately rush over, fighting to be her man.

chapters.title: Chapter 813: Lingering Emotions!
chapters.body:
Chapter 813: Lingering Emotions!

Chapter 813: Lingering Emotions!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Willianna looked at Yue Zhong, her pupils dilating, as she gave off an incredibly attractive aura. She reached out to caress Yue Zhong’s jaw, laughing coyly, "Those men are all weak and sad. They can’t make me excited. Even if I look at them for a long period, I still find them disgusting. There’s no charm at all. Be my man, Yue Zhong, I will treat you well!"

He was being teased!!

Yue Zhong blanked out for a while, he was actually being teased like a girl back on Earth. Willianna’s gaze on him was like he enjoyed looking at beautiful women, furthermore, it was the first time his jaw was being caressed like so!

"I refuse!!"

He reached out in an overbearing manner and brought her into his arms, using a position of power to look down at this beautiful, sexy and charming lady, before pushing her under him, and spoke forcefully, "It’s not me being your man, but you will be my woman."

"No! You must be my man!"

This flirty Willianna suddenly grabbed Yue Zhong’s body with a glint in her eyes, forcefully pushing him to one side, intending to gain the top position.

After all, in this place, Willianna had been brought up to treat relationships with men as normal. A woman could have 3 or 4 men and no one would bat an eye. However, if she was to do it, she must be in the top position and dominate, although she liked this manly Yue Zhong, she did not appreciate being dominated.

Yue Zhong was also caught unprepared for this little minx to suddenly explode with strength. He was thus flung easily to one side.

"Just be obedient and accept your fate!"

Willianna twisted and deftly swung her body over his, her face full of excitement, her smile enchanting. She used her strength and tore off Yue Zhong’s outer clothes before she was taken aback. She caught sight of the inner Type 4 Mutant Beast hide.

On Earth, Yue Zhong had commissioned the usage of the Type 4 Sea Snake scales to be made into 10 innerwear for his use. Its defense was astonishing, preventing even cannons from destroying it.

However, even such a powerful defensive suit had been through the worst of wears and tears due to Yue Zhong’s conquests. This particular piece was already covered in many scars, especially the right arm area, obviously having lost the entire right portion before.

Willianna used her hands to touch the Type 4 Mutant Beast hide, her eyes burning with desire as she licked her lips, "This is great! You’re really something else! I’m liking you more and more!!"

She hated those weak, flower-boy types, instead preferring men with strength and combat experience. Seeing the Type 4 Mutant Beast hide and its ravaged state, she became incredibly excited.

Noticing her passionate gaze, Yue Zhong’s own desire was also set aflame, and he quickly flipped her over and chuckled, "Not bad, I also like you, little minx!"

Willianna was caught by surprise and tried to exert her strength of 20 times that of a normal person.

However, Yue Zhong was a Type 4 expert possessing 38 times Strength, no matter how she struggled, it was impossible to escape from his clutches.

Both parties continued to struggle, their bodies entwining.

In the end, following a moan of pain and pleasure, a bright red flower appeared on the pelts, before multiple moans continued after that.

As the acts of passion continued for 2 hours, these 2 with terrifying physiques laid together, surrounded by the various Mutant Beast pelt.

After the bout of sex, Willianna curled up in Yue Zhong’s embrace, wearing a satisfied smile, "Not bad! Yue Zhong, truly strong. Be my 1st man. I will treat you will. In the future, even if I get more men, you will always be my first husband."

In response, Yue Zhong slapped her butt cheek, "Silly, with me, you can forget about having another man. Be good and be my woman. Otherwise, see how I take care of you."

"Alright, alright!" She chuckled brightly, radiating bliss as she laid in his arms for a while more, before asking lazily, "Yue Zhong, did you truly come to Storm Valley just to take a look? Is there anything you need my help for? Let me make this clear first, if you want to do anything harmful to Storm Valley, I will not help you."

After gaining Yue Zhong, the satisfied Willianna dropped her icy stance and became a lot gentler.

Yue Zhong caressed her smooth skin and spoke, "I really did come here just to observe, to see what the mythical Storm Valley was like. Oh yes, if I want to leave Storm Valley, will you come with me?"

"You want to leave? Can’t you stay?" Willianna was taken aback and lifted her head to look at Yue Zhong. Her eyes were filled with unwillingness, "For me, can’t you consider it? If you stay here, I can go out and hunt, feed and clothe you well. You just have to stay at home to handle the chores and look after our kids."

Yue Zhong pinched her beautiful breasts lightly, "No! I still have many things to do. Even if I stay here, I can’t possibly stay at home all day to do the chores and look after the kids. You don’t like such a man, don’t you? Come with me."

Willianna sunk into a dilemma, her thoughts in turmoil. In the end, she shook her head, "No, I can’t. My family, friends, and subordinates are all here. I can’t give everything up to follow you."

Although she liked Yue Zhong a lot, it was not to the crazy extent that she could give everything up for him. After all, she was not yet blinded by love.

Yue Zhong sighed lightly but did not push the issue, "Forget it. Oh right, I would like to meet your Queen, I need to discuss something with her."

"Sorry, I don’t have that kind of clearance." She grinned apologetically, before asking, "Wait, why do you want to see Her Majesty?"

Yue Zhong replied, "I want to obtain some Prehistoric tech from her. You just have to report to your superiors, say the leader of Vulture Valley Yue Zhong has requested an audience. She will most likely see me."

Willianna frowned, "Yue Zhong? Vulture Valley’s leader? Are you very famous? How come I haven’t heard of you? Don’t be too confident, Yue Zhong! In the entire Green Region, only the leaders of the 3 factions or Type 4 Divine Warriors have the qualifications to meet Her Majesty. Other than that, no one will possibly be entertained."

Yue Zhong chuckled, "The Sun Alliance sent a hundred Sun Warriors, and they were wiped out. If she knew this, she will definitely see me."

Willianna’s eyes widened in shock, "For real? You wiped out a hundred Sun Warriors?"

The Sun Warriors were the most elite of the Sun Alliance. Upon equipping the Sun Armor, every one of them would reach the peak of Type 3 Divine Warrior strength. A hundred of them was not something even a Type 4 Divine Warrior could underestimate.

Yue Zhong flipped his hands, and a perfect set of Sun Battle Armor appeared in his hands, he handed it to her, "This armor is for you! Treat it as a gift!"

"Oh my goodness! It’s real!! This is amazing! Yue Zhong, I love you so much!" Willianna touched the armor, and could not bear to put it down. She turned to eye Yue Zhong with a hint of desire, kissing him passionately again.

To an ordinary warrior, this Sun Armor was incredibly precious. To Willianna, it was even more precious than a hundred carat gemstone. She was thus extremely happy.

She seemed to have forgotten her fatigue as she kissed him deeply, "Let’s do it again!!"

After an entire night of passion, early the next morning, Willianna left the place, heading towards the palace of Storm Valley.

She quickly returned, following behind her were 16 members with green battle armor as well as one of the 8 personal guards of the Queen, Ying Lan.

Willianna was definitely a charming and alluring beauty, but beside Ying Lan, she was somewhat inferior.

Ying Lan eyed Yue Zhong coolly and asked, "You’re Yue Zhong?"

Yue Zhong did not bat an eyelid, "That’s right!"

Without any further bullshit, she turned around, "The Queen has summoned you, come with me!"

Willianna stood one side, looking helplessly at Yue Zhong, before following Ying Lan.

She was a powerful warrior but compared to Ying Lan, one of the 8 Storm Greats, she was just a rank-and-file soldier.

Yue Zhong was escorted by the Storm Valley warriors as they went towards the castle.

He lifted his head to look at the Storm Valley, his heart filled with shock, "This is the Storm Valley Palace? No way! It’s basically an upgraded version of the Sky Fortress!!"

Floating in the skies, there was a huge alloy structure stretching about 30km. This was the Imperial City of the Storm Valley!

chapters.title: Chapter 814: Storm Imperial City!
chapters.body:
Chapter 814: Storm Imperial City!

Chapter 814: Storm Imperial City!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Yue Zhong lifted his head to admire that floating structure, his eyes full of shock. This was the first large structure that was made entirely out of alloy. Even the Radiant Battleship, a Gold-Treasure, was not as big as this Storm Imperial City.

"What did they use? How could they achieve its anti-gravity? How much energy would this consume?" Yue Zhong could not help but wonder, as the questions ran through his head. Such a scene was still too shocking.

On Earth, Yue Zhong had also managed to produce something close to the Sky Fortress, and it was able to float. However, it required a huge energy source.

The floating city spanned over 30 km, and one could tell that it must weigh a lot with just a look. If such a structure wanted to float on this planet, which seemed to have twice the gravity compared to Earth, the energy consumption was definitely not little.

Even a Type 5 Mutant Beast nucleus would not be sufficient. The technology was truly way out of Yue Zhong’s imagination.

At the same time, as he observed carefully, he noticed that the huge alloy structure was not just one entire piece. Instead, there were various covers of different shapes all around.

Since Yue Zhong had come across his fair share of technology and equipment, he guessed that those covers should be for the radars and weapons. Just 10% of this floating city’s weapons was enough to annihilate any enemy.

Compared to this Storm Imperial City, the Sun Alliance Palace was practically trash.

Facing this, Yue Zhong’s eyes lit with desire, if he could gain such a city, even if a million-strong army came, they would be seeking death.

A dozen Mutant Birds that had dinosaur heads with a pair of broad wings came swooping down from the floating city.

From on top of them, a dozen female warriors jumped down.

One of them came up to Ying Lan and bowed, "Lady Ying Lan!"

"Let’s go up!"

Ying Lan spoke coldly to Yue Zhong before leaping up to the back of one Mutant Bird.

"Strong! They actually managed to tame Mutant Birds as well, this Storm Valley is indeed a powerhouse, and can definitely stand firm compared to the other 2 hegemons." Yue Zhong went up on another Mutant Bird and thought silently.

Mutant Birds were tough to tame, even with the Sun Alliance comprising of many smaller factions, not one had managed to provide a Mutant Bird before. The fact that Storm Valley had their own was impressive.

One young and nimble female warrior chirped, "Grab my waist and sit tight!"

Yue Zhong did not stand on ceremony and immediately wrapped his hands around her waist, as a nice, tender feeling traveled up his hands.

The female warrior grabbed her ropes and barked out once, following that, the Mutant Bird flapped its wings and soared into the skies, heading for the floating city.

In the city, there were lush greenery and strange plants growing, alongside some strange trees as well. Countless beautiful stone structures were laid out all over the place.

On the streets, a number of women with incredible looks and aura were walking about.

The stark contrast of this Imperial City and the rest of Storm Valley was obvious, there was not a single man to be seen.

The flock of Mutant Birds came to rest in a wide field.

Ying Lan turned to Yue Zhong and spoke coldly, "Come with me!"

Yue Zhong followed her.

Just then, 4 officers came up and stopped in front of Ying Lan, "Lady Ying Lan, please wait a moment!"

She had a curious glint as she asked, "What’s going on?"

One of the officers responded, "Her Highness Liu Mei’er has ordered for Yue Zhong to be brought to the Hundred Herb Temple! She had already discussed this with her Majesty."

Ying Lan replied coldly, "Alright, I got it!"

She then turned and brought Yue Zhong to another location.

Leading Yue Zhong to a vast palace, she spoke, "This is the Hundred Herb Temple, please wait for a moment!"

After that, Ying Lan did not seem to care about Yue Zhong’s opinions or staying back to discuss anything with him, as she quickly led her subordinates and left.

Yue Zhong frowned slightly, before carefully looking around, his wariness heightened. He might be strong, and if need be, he could summon Type 5 Mount Tai over with his Tamed Beast Summon technique to destroy this place, but he might fall here if he was not careful.

Observing the place carefully, he did not detect any danger. He flipped his hands and the radar-equipped tablet appeared. Bai Yi’s image flashed on the screen, as Yue Zhong asked, "Bai Yi, are you able to control the central computer of this floating metal island?"

Bai Yi was a super A.I. and was able to display her abilities through computers.

Data flashed through her eyes, before coming to a stop. She quickly replied, "On this metal island, I did not discover any trace of computers. There are 3 possibilities, 1 is that it doesn’t exist here. The second is that the metal island does not rely on any computer at all. The last possibility is that while the central computer exists, it’s being shielded by some mysterious power, preventing me from detecting it. Based on the makeup of this metal island, there was definitely the usage of a computer during the building process. As for now, it is still tough to ascertain where the computer is. Because the data lines have not been used for more than a hundred years. Most sectors are actually down."

Yue Zhong frowned slightly, "Is that so? Seems like I have to ask Luo Qing Qing herself!"

"Who are you?"

As Yue Zhong was deep in thoughts, a voice suddenly rang out.

Yue Zhong turned to the source of the voice, discovering a handsome man whose body was not too burly, not scrawny. He was good-looking, through and through.

A young man with sword-shaped brows, a straight posture, and an uncommon demeanor looked coldly at Yue Zhong. It was he who had spoken.

Yue Zhong shot that handsome young teen a cold glance and retorted, "And who are you? Before asking someone else’s name, don’t you have to announce your own name first? Don’t you even know these basic manners?"

chapters.title: Chapter 815: Choosing A Consort!
chapters.body:
Chapter 815: Choosing A Consort!

Chapter 815: Choosing a Consort!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Hearing Yue Zhong’s words, the handsome youth was taken aback.

6 guards beside him immediately stepped forward, barking furiously at Yue Zhong, "Impudent! This is the Young Master of the Rokujo Clan, His Highness Rokujo Bikuma. He is set to be the main King of the Queen. You dare to be disrespectful, do you seek death?"

After they shouted, Rokujo Bikuma’s eyes regained their original prideful gaze.

"King?"

Yue Zhong’s mouth twitched, before looking at the handsome youth again, a sense of ridicule in his mind.

Yue Zhong tried asking, "Don’t tell me you are all about to become the Queen’s consorts, are you?"

One of them glared disdainfully at Yue Zhong, "Ignorant fool, I don’t understand how such an ugly man like you can actually be here. This is the place where the Queen gathers her consorts. Those that can truly match the Queen only number four. The rest are all her toys. The position of a concubine compared to us toys are very different."

Among the many handsome men in this huge temple, Yue Zhong was truly insignificant in terms of looks. In truth, he might be considered decent among most other ordinary guys, but compared to all these pretty boys, he was lacking in the looks department.

Yue Zhong looked at the number of pretty men here and laughed lightly, "And to think that the saying was that all men are not good. When women are in power, aren’t they the same."

Both genders were biological creatures and had similar needs. The Empress Dowager of the Qin Dynasty was a woman of many faces, controlling behind the scenes, her authority absolute. In modern society, rich women would also play around with toyboys, otherwise, there would not be an industry of gigolos as well.

When he thought of that overbearing and charming Luo Qing Qing possessing so many men, Yue Zhong felt pity. Although she was beautiful and had an otherworldly charm to her, she was not his type after all.

The expression of one of the youths turned ugly, his muscles turning taut as he glared at Yue Zhong and stepped forward, "What did you say?! Are you insulting Her Majesty?! Seems like you require a beating, I will teach you the manners of this palace!!"

Yue Zhong shot him a disdainful look, turning around and speaking icily, "Just based on you? Train another few hundred years, sissy!"

The youth trembled with rage when scolded like that. He tapped his foot and charged towards Yue Zhong with an 8-times Speed, his pale fist blasting towards Yue Zhong’s head, "Watch my fist!!"

"Wow! Zheng Guan Xi’s speed is so fast!"

"Truly astounding! He already has the strength comparable to a warrior! Powerful!"

"Handsome, and strong! Seems like he’s going to be a strong contender for the position of King!"

"..."

As the majority of the youths were looking at Zheng Guan Xi, their eyes were filled with a solemn look. Although they were all good-looking, most of them only had the physique that was twice as powerful as ordinary people. As someone with 8-times that, Zheng Guan Xi was already an impressive fighter.

‘Too weak!"

Yue Zhong sat on a chair, eyeing Zheng Guan Xi who was rushing towards him and sent a casual slap across his chest.

Peng!

Following a loud sound, Zheng Guan Xi was sent hurtling into the other side of the temple, spitting out a large amount of blood, as he crumpled to the floor.

Seeing this, all the youths had huge changes in their expressions. They could not help but retreat a few steps, eyeing Yue Zhong with fear and trepidation. No one was willing to go help Zheng Guan Xi up.

Zheng Guan Xi was good-looking and had decent fighting capabilities. He was slated to be one of the forerunners for the position of King. Hence, no one was willing to help save him. In fact, if he died, they would be happier.

"The Queen, Her Majesty, arrives!!"

Following a resounding announcement by a female warrior, 16 warriors wrapped in the green Storm Battle Armor came escorting 2 extremely beautiful women into the temple palace.

"We greet Your Majesty!"

All the handsome youths immediately got down on their knees and lowered their heads, their eyes filled with expectation and desire.

Only Yue Zhong continued to sit one side, eyeing everything going on with mild interest.

Under the protection of the 16 Storm Warriors, the 2 absolute beauties sat on 2 imperial thrones.

Yue Zhong gazed towards the 2, noticing one was the charismatic yet arrogant Storm Queen Luo Qing Qing. Her visage was cold yet filled with an attractive charm and confidence. The other person was also a beautiful woman who was decked in white fox hide, her skin fair, her features like something out of a painting. Her figure was petite, and she exuded a graceful and holy charm.

At this time, Luo Qing Qing’s shape gaze fell upon Yue Zhong. Her single glance was enough to cause goosebumps on Yue Zhong’s skin.

He could sense her confidence and oppressive aura, exceeding even that of his own, "Strong! This woman is a true top expert!"

Yue Zhong had only been an ordinary university student before the apocalypse. After countless battles and struggles, he managed to get to where he was at. The period of time was barely over a year or so, and although he was already starting to possess the bearing of a ruler, it was still nothing compared to Luo Qing Qing who obviously had ruled for more than a dozen years.

The pretty girl beside Luo Qing Qing also eyed Yue Zhong, her eyes filled with a curious gaze.

Luo Qing QIng gazed at Yue Zhong for some time, before asking sharply, "You’re the leader of the Vulture Valley, Yue Zhong?"

Yue Zhong responded without arrogance nor subservience, "That’s right, Luo Qing Qing! I’m Yue Zhong!"

"Yue Zhong!"

"Who’s that?"

"..."

The numerous kneeling men began to wonder in their hearts. They finally understood that this man was different from them.

Seated on her throne, Luo Qing Qing’s eyes flashed, and without a sound, she suddenly dashed towards Yue Zhong with a powerful fist.

Since her speed was fast, the booming sound of her speed breaking the sound barrier, combined with the oppressive pressure she was exuding, formed into a powerful intent on blasting Yue Zhong to pieces. Even a peak Type 3 Divine Warrior would be unable to get up and evade.

All around her, other than Rokujo Bikuma, the rest of the handsome men felt an intense pressure crushing them. They found it hard to breathe.

Yue Zhong’s pupils narrowed, his right fist enveloped with Dark Dou Qi as it slammed out against the incoming shockwave, dispersing the force.

That single fist broke through Luo Qing Qing’s intent, but Yue Zhong was shocked inwardly, "This woman is strong! She is like already half-step into the Type 5 realm, and might be able to break through anytime."

The corners of Luo Qing Qing’s mouth curled slightly, revealing a satisfied smile, "Not bad, to be able to receive my fist, you’re definitely a Type 4 Divine Warrior. Even if you’re not Yue Zhong, you have the capability to stand before me. On account of your strength, you’re in line to become my King. Work hard!"

Hearing those words, the many handsome men kneeling began to show expressions of envy and jealousy. These people could fight their whole lives only to attain a toyboy status, whereas Yue Zhong had immediately gained a position to fight for the King’s seat. They were naturally envious.

Yue Zhong was taken aback, as he frowned slightly, "Luo Qing Qing, I had no intentions of becoming your King. I’m here this time to discuss purchasing some of the prehistoric techs you have."

Luo Qing Qing was definitely a top beauty with an otherworldly charm, however, Yue Zhong did not want to share her with a hundred other men.

Luo Qing Qing’s countenance turned extremely frosty as fury erupted in her eyes, "Are you trying to make a fool out of me? This is the Hundred Herb Temple where the contenders for the King’s position stay. You came in here willingly and now you’re trying to back out? Deserving of death!!"

Yue Zhong was inwardly shocked as his browed furrowed deeper, a sense of unease rising in his heart, "Willingly become your King?"

"Audacious, you dare to take Her Majesty for a fool!"

At this time, Ying Lan who had been standing quietly by Luo Qing Qing’s side, charged out like a storm, thrusting her spear towards Yue Zhong.

Powered by the Storm Armor, Ying Lan broke past her Type 3 Divine Warrior strength, reaching the initial level of Type 4. The mysterious array behind her glowed and dimmed erratically, as a powerful gust of wind blew, giving her the appearance of an enraged killing goddess.

"She is really trying to kill me!"

Yue Zhong could sense the killing intent from Ying Lan, and his caution was pushed to the extreme. Activating his Shadow Steps, his body twisted as he brought his right fist enveloped with Devil Flames to smash towards her chest without any mercy.

Ying Lan was also an experienced fighter. Under such circumstances, she managed to twist slightly, evading the sure-kill, but Yue Zhong’s fist managed to land on her body, which sent her shooting into a wall, as she spat out large amounts of blood.

Luo Qing Qing’s eyes turned red with fury, as she disappeared from her seat, "Audacious! You dare to injure my people in my Imperial City! I condemn you to death!!"

chapters.title: Chapter 816: Abnormal Change!
chapters.body:
Chapter 816: Abnormal Change!

Chapter 816: Abnormal Change!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

With a terrible hurricane blowing behind her, Luo Qing Qing suddenly appeared in front of Yue Zhong, both fists blasting towards Yue Zhong.

"Bastard!!"

Yue Zhong’s eyes flashed with anger, his Dark Dou Qi channeling. He activated his Shadow Steps, the Flame Blade in his hands slashing towards Luo Qing Qing with the speed of sound.

The Flame Blade slashed through Luo Qing Qing’s body a meteor, cleaving her in half.

"Not good, it’s a clone!"

His abundant combat experience felt a light tap on his blade, and expecting the next move, he twisted his body and leaped to the side.

A long leg suddenly lashed out from behind him, aiming for his waist with a powerful kick.

Peng!

Yue Zhong was slammed heavily in the waist, his entire body flying towards the wall on the other side. His Second Order Body of Steel groaned, a few bones cracking. If it had been him when he had just entered this world, he would have been incapacitated.

Having gained the upper hand, Luo Qing Qing transformed into a blur, unleashing a flurry of blows on him.

Yue Zhong was after all an Evolver with plenty of combat experience, facing Luo Qing Qing’s aggressive blows, he was completely at a disadvantage, and was like a small boat that could capsize in this torrential storm. However, he held on firmly and did not allow her to deal any devastating blows.

"This damn woman is truly strong!!"

Peng!

Following a loud boom, Yue Zhong was sent slamming into a wall, his internal qi and blood in turmoil. Unable to help it, he spat out a mouthful of blood.

Luo Qing Qing was aggressive and did not let up on her enemies. She continued to charge at Yue Zhong and rain blows down on him.

After defending against a flurry of blows, Yue Zhong was once again slammed in his chest, being sent flying towards the distance.

"Her Majesty is victorious!!"

"Her Majesty is victorious!!"

"Her Majesty is invincible!!"

"..."

The various pretty men began to cheer out in excitement, gazing at Luo Qing Qing and admiring her valiantness.

Such a character, even on Earth, before the apocalypse, would definitely gain the admiration and attraction of countless men. To the men of Storm Valley, Luo Qing Qing was such a character worthy of their respect and admiration.

The handsome Rokujo Bikuma looked at Luo Qing Qing with a strange gaze.

Yue Zhong spat another mouthful of blood, his body riddled with injuries, as he stared gravely at Luo Qing Qing, "In a fair battle, just comparing our physique, although I hate to admit it, I’m truly not a match for her!"

Evolving to the peak of Type 4 Divine Warrior, Yue Zhong’s physique was already at a level where it was hard to find opponents. Today, he was actually bested by a lady, causing him to feel unwilling. After all, he was a male chauvinist to a certain extent.

The feeling quickly faded, replaced by an irrepressible killing intent, "I guess I can only use other methods to kill her. If need be, I’ll just summon Mount Tai to come and tear this whole place apart!"

He was someone who had trawled through a mountain of zombies and corpses, in the earlier duel, he had lost his cool in a moment of anger. However, he quickly regained his calm and would choose the most optimal method of dealing with his enemies.

Just as he was preparing to activate his other abilities, the overbearing Luo Qing Qing charged right in front of him, when suddenly, her face turned pale, and she seemed to falter slightly.

Yue Zhong’s exceptional ability caught that moment of weakness and he brought his fist encased with Dark Dou Qi to slam into her abdomen, sending her shooting towards the crowd of people, as a thought flashed past his mind, "Good chance!"

Seeing the fall of their leader, the men all had changes in expressions as they scrambled for cover.

"Your Majesty, let me help you!!"

Right at this time, the handsome Rokujo Bikuma stepped forward, his face full of concern.

The pale Luo Qing Qing barked, "Rokujo, stand down!!"

Rokujo Bikuma seemed not to have noticed her words, choosing to continue his dash forward.

In order to avoid injuring him, Luo Qing Qing retracted her aura.

At that moment, the corners of Rokujo Bikuma’s mouth curled, revealing a smug expression. His right hand suddenly flashed with a white light, piercing towards Luo Qing Qing.

Luo Qing Qing had let down her guard around the person most likely to be her future King, and thus was sent flying a second time by the white light, her chest penetrated.

At the same time, the little beauty seated in the other Imperial Throne suddenly burst forth with multiple palm strikes, blasting towards the Storm Warriors beside her.

Caught unprepared, all 16 members of the Storm Warriors in their green Storm Armor were killed instantly.

After dealing with Luo Qing Qing, Rokujo Bikuma slapped his hands together, and a number of strings within the entire hall appeared.

Within a breath, the hundreds of beautiful men were all sliced up into multiple pieces, fresh blood dying the floor red.

Yue Zhong watched this sudden abnormal turn of events and frowned, retreating a few steps, his body taut. He was aware that he had just been embroiled in a coup de grâce.

Luo Qing Qing’s chest had been pierced by a laser blade, blood flowing out the corner of her mouth. She eyed the beauty in the other chair with disbelief asking, "It’s you! Mei’er, why did you betray me?"

Liu Mei’er smiled alluringly, "You didn’t expect this, did you? Big Sister Luo, your trusted little sister, your future King, and your most trusted aide would all betray you. Doesn’t it feel good?"

Ying Lan, who had been sent flying into the wall earlier by Yue Zhong, leaped up and came to Liu Mei’er’s side, staring coldly at Luo Qing Qing.

Luo Qing Qing stared at the 3 of them, a stabbing pain in her heart, "Why? Why? I have never mistreated you guys, why betray me?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 817: The Oriole Behind!
chapters.body:
Chapter 817: The Oriole Behind!

Chapter 817: The Oriole Behind!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Liu Mei’er’s face contorted as she shouted, "Sis! The entire Storm Valley has been under my management! What have you done? You’re just someone stronger and have been entrusted by our Great Mother, that was how you became Storm Queen! What other qualifications do you have to receive the love and admiration of our people? While I have to remain beneath you?! In terms of strength, yes, I’m just initial Type 4 Divine Warrior, and can’t compare to you. But in everything else, I’m far above you. The entire Storm Valley has been managed well at my hands, you have no right to be queen! I should be the ruler of Storm Valley, the true Queen of Storm Valley."

"As to your future King Rikudo Bikuma, he has long since gotten tired of you, who don’t understand men at all." Liu Mei’er smiled, stretching out her leg towards Rikudo Bikuma.

"Many thanks, Queen!"

Rikudo Bikuma licked his lips as a look of passionate desire appeared in his eyes. He lowered his head and started licking her legs in a perverse manner, obviously a sign of his fetish.

Luo Qing Qing gasped for breath as she stared at Ying Lan of the 8 Greats, asking, "What about you? Ying Lan, why you as well?"

Ying Lan’s eyes flashed with an apologetic look before she gritted her teeth and said, "My apologies, Your Majesty, I’d always been a spy sent from the Pterosaur Mountain. My real name is not Ying Lan, but Zheng Yun! I’m thankful for your trust and high regard, but I cannot betray the orders of Pterosaur Mountain!"

Luo Qing Qing was shocked and she stared at Liu Mei’er, "You actually colluded with Pterosaur Mountain! No wonder you dare to act against me. Zheng Zhen and Dao Ge aren’t easily satiated wolves, what conditions did you promise them?!"

Liu Mei’er seemed to become excited as she grinned sadistically, "My dear sister, I did not promise them much, only that after this, I will sent you to them with your abilities wasted. They will love you dearly, sister. Those men that you hate over there will love you truly ‘well’, the ex-Queen of Storm Valley!!"

Luo Qing Qing’s countenance turned pale. The 2 leaders of Pterosaur Mountain were widely renowned perverts. If she landed in their arms, she will lead a fate worse than a prostitute. When she had gained control of Storm Valley, she had offended them and the Sun Alliance on multiple occasions. Her future would truly be murky once she ended up there.

Liu Mei’er laughed out loud with a contorted expression, "Haha!! Haha!! Sister, I know that there are many Storm Warriors loyal to you. Once you’re sent there, those diehard loyal subordinates of yours will be sent together!! You will all become the toys of those stinking men there!! That’ll be so interesting!! Haha! Haha!!"

Liu Mei’er had been suppressed by Luo Qing Qing for countless years, having to act as a loyal princess. Her innate twisted personality was now unleashed for all to see, finally free from suppression.

"What ugliness!" Yue Zhong thought coldly as he looked at Liu Mei’er. Although this woman had beauty, her current expression was truly twisted. Her excitement was revolting to Yue Zhong, and could not compare to Willianna’s cuteness.

Luo Qing Qing turned to Yue Zhong and spoke, "Yue Zhong, you heard it all. It was a misunderstanding between us. Join hands with me, let’s kill these traitors together! I can grant you 20 Storm Battle Armors."

Yue Zhong laughed coldly, retreating 2 steps, "Why should I? You’re the defeated right now, furthermore, you were the one who attacked without checking facts."

Yue Zhong eyed Liu Mei’er and spoke coldly, "Liu Mei’er, I came here this time to get the prehistoric tech of your Storm Valley. As long as you give them to me, I can forget about you plotting against me. Otherwise, don’t blame me for what happens next."

"Prehistoric tech? You truly like to daydream eh? Why don’t you take a good look at who this is?" Liu Mei’er laughed lightly before clapping her hands.

2 burly men dragged in Willianna, who was tied up tightly.

Willianna stared at Liu Mei’er with rage, but when she saw Luo Qing QIng who had been injured gravely as well as Yue Zhong, her eyes flashed with shock.

Liu Mei’er laughed out, before throwing out an extremely attractive proposal, "Do you see that? That’s your woman Willianna. Yue Zhong, if you wait there obediently after I’m done, I can return her to you. At the same time, before handing the Storm Queen over, I can let you play with her for a few days. Every single one of her Storm Warriors are beauties, I can give ⅓ to you, how about that?"

Luo Qing Qing was a top-notch beauty that had an incredible demeanor and valiant aura. To be able to toy with a queen like that, it was truly a form of allure to most men.

Yue Zhong’s brows arched, and he was about to say something when suddenly, something else happened. Rokudo Bikuma, who was still licking Liu Mei’er’s legs suddenly waved his right hand, his eyes flashing with a cold light, as a white light shot towards Liu Mei’er’s chest.

"Stinking man, you truly are a disloyal, blind wolf. Did you think I would not be wary of you?"

Liu Mei’er’s eyes flashed coldly, as a tornado formed in her right hand, slamming into the white light, slapping the dagger away. She then kicked out viciously, her powerful strength exploding out and slamming into Rokudo Bikuma’s body, sending him flying into a wall.

The 2 men who were grabbing Willianna suddenly exploded forth, one of them glowing with a grey color. A powerful force blasted outwards, his fist slamming towards Liu Mei’er viciously.

"Zheng Zhen, it is you!!"

Without time to defend, Liu Mei’er could only lift up her jade-like hand to slap the incoming fist.

Hong!

With a burst of might, Zheng Zhen’s superior strength sent Liu Mei’er flying.

The other person appeared noiselessly behind Liu Mei’er, throwing a punch without caring that she was a girl.

The terrifying strength exploded out, slamming into Liu Mei’er as she crashed towards the floor like a pitiful animal, spitting out a mouthful of blood.

The expert behind her flipped his hands, causing a number of vines to appear, piercing into Liu Mei’er’s body, as they begun to absorb her essence.

Liu Mei’er let out a scream of agony, eyeing Zheng Zhen and Dao Ge beside her with hatred, "Zheng Zhen, Dao Ge, it actually is you two!! You dare to go back on your word and attack me?! Why?!! Aren’t you afraid of being mocked?!"

The burly and handsome Zheng Zhen caressed Liu Mei’er’s chin with a mocking look, "Stupid fool!! My interest in Luo Qing Qing is real, but I’m also interested in you. The 8 Storm Greats as well. All you women are just prey to me. How dare you prey discuss equality with me, overstepping your limits!!"

The man with golden hair who had injured Liu Mei’er in one hit, and was absorbing her essence through his vines chuckled menacingly, "Zheng Zhen, Liu Mei’er is yours. I want Luo Qing Qing."

Zheng Zhen chuckled back, "I too want to play with this proud woman, what do we do?"

Dao Ge’s eyes flashed with a lustful light, "Alright! I’ll toy with her for a month, before giving her to you. However, you must also let me have Liu Mei’er afterward. I love playing around with these stupid women with their essence and life force all sucked out."

At this time, Rokudo Bikuma who had been sent flying wiped his mouth, walking in front of Zheng Zhen, "Dino King, I’ve already settled these 2 women as per our agreement. You guys have to uphold your end yes?"

Zheng Zhen smiled lightly, "Of course! As per our agreement, all the men and a quarter of the women in Storm Valley will belong to you. You will become the new Storm King."

A look of joy came over Rikudo Bikuma’s face, as he kneeled, "Thank you, Your Majesty! From today on, the Rokudo Family will forever be loyal to you, and serve you with all we have, until the end of our days."

After that, he stood up, glancing at Liu Mei’er and Luo Qing Qing with disdain, "The two Queens, the men of the Rokudo Family are not your toys. This is a world of men, you women are only fit to be our toys."

The two of them stared at Rokudo Bikuma with hatred, however, one of them was injured, the other attacked by surprise, and was even pierced by Mutant Vines. Both of them weren’t a match for Zheng Zhen or Dao Ge.

Zheng Zhen stepped on Liu Mei’er’s stomach, causing her to spit out another mouthful of blood. He then turned to Yue Zhong, "You must be Yue Zhong? How about joining us? The promises these bitches made earlier, we can fulfill them."

To these overlords, women were just toys and decorative ornaments. They sought power and authority.

Yue Zhong hesitated for a while, before speaking, "I want prehistoric tech of both Pterosaur Mountain and Storm Valley. I want this Imperial City as well as that woman. Give me all of these, and I can pretend to overlook all of these."

He did not hold either Liu Mei’er or Luo Qing Qing in high regards, compared to them, he preferred the tech of both factions.

Dao Ge’s expression sunk, "Yue Zhong, don’t ask for a mile when given an inch! Even if you’re a Type 4 Divine Warrior, there are 2 of us here, if you want to provoke us, don’t think about leaving here alive!"

chapters.title: Chapter 818: Yue Zhong’S True Strength!
chapters.body:
Chapter 818: Yue Zhong’S True Strength!

Chapter 818: Yue Zhong’s True Strength!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Luo Qing Qing’s eyes flashed with a strange glint as she barked, "Yue Zhong, they are shepherds commissioned by the Dino-people to raise other humans as cattle! Once they destroy our Storm Valley, the millions of humans in Green Region will become the food for the Dino-people!! Yue Zhong, if you still have any conscience, help me kill them together!"

Zheng Zhen’s eyes flashed coldly, shooting towards Luo Qing Qing with a vicious expression as he slapped her, "Bitch! You speak too much!!"

Luo Qing Qing’s eyes flashed with fury, as her body twitched and she spat out blood once more, trying to support herself up.

As Zheng Zhen prepared to slap her once more, a huge hand stopped him.

Zheng Zhen’s pupils narrowed, as his face turned dark and he stared at Yue Zhong, "Yue Zhong, are you intending to go against us?"

Yue Zhong eyed Zheng Zhen before speaking indifferently, "Luo Qing Qing, if I were to help your Storm Valley out of this, how do you intend to repay me?"

Luo Qing Qing stared at Yue Zhong warily, "What do you want?"

Even in this dangerous situation, she did not want to promise anything without thinking it through. If Yue Zhong wanted her to be a slave for her whole life, she would rather die.

Yue Zhong quickly spoke of his conditions, "Your Storm Valley tech, this Imperial City, as well as your forces to help me deal with Pterosaur Mountain. After annihilating them, I want their tech. Oh yes. Willianna is my woman, you can choose to let her come with me, if she does decide to stay, you must promote her, and ensure her safety."

Such a proud woman like Luo Qing Qing would definitely agree to be Yue Zhong’s slave. He was not interested in her as well, thus he did not ask for such a condition.

She was after all a decisive warlord, although his conditions were harsh, she made her decision in a second, "Fine! I promise you!!"

"Kill him!!"

Zheng Zhen barked out ominously, with a tap of his foot, he shot towards Yue Zhong with a grey glow on his back.

Dao Ge simply kicked Liu Mei’er to one side, before his body flashed and he disappeared from his location.

Ying Lan, or Zheng Yun, who was standing beside Zheng Zhen, charged forth at Yue Zhong, her Storm Armor glowing brightly, as she thrust her spear towards Yue Zhong.

Yue Zhong’s pupils narrowed, as he unleashed his Art of Fear, causing a powerful Spirit wave to spread out.

When that terrifying ability slammed into Zheng Zhen and Dao Ge, there did not seem to be any effect. However, for Zheng Yun, her entire body trembled.

The Second Order Art of Fear, combined with Yue Zhong’s high Spirit, even though it was unable to shock the Type 3 Divine Warrior Zheng Yun, it was enough to shake her out of her wits for a moment.

At that moment, a void appeared in mid-air, and 10 sharp bone spikes shot out, targeting the 3 of them.

Zheng Zhen sent out a punch, his right fist enveloped in a grey Battle Armor, causing the bone spike to shatter upon contact.

Dao Ge’s body flashed, causing the 3 bone spikes to brush past the shadow of his image.

Zheng Yun managed to recover from the momentarily stun, but by then, the 3 bone spikes were dangerously close. She screamed out, "Father, save me!!"

However, a scene that caused her to despair unfolded, as Zheng Zhen ignored her pleas, instead, appearing in front of Yue Zhong with a cold glare, sending out a fist towards his heart.

Zheng Yun’s body twisted, as she tried her best to evade the one closest. However, the remaining two pierced towards her heart and right chest.

Dang!

With a loud impact, White Bones’ spikes were unable to pierce through her Storm Armor, however, the powerful impact was enough to shake her heart, causing her to be sent flying.

White Bones appeared out of thin air, its body firing countless bone spikes towards Zheng Yun.

She had just been struck in her heart, and her blood flow was in turmoil. With the protection and enhancement of the Storm Armor, she was able to reach the Type 4 Divine Warrior stage, surpassing White Bones, however, she was still being suppressed by it.

On the other side, Zheng Zhen had appeared in front of Yue Zhong mysteriously, his right fist covered in a grey light as he punched towards Yue Zhong.

With a thought, Yue Zhong activated his Gravity Manipulation, causing a powerful gravitational field to envelop his surroundings.

Zheng Zhen and Dao Ge were both affected by the 8-times gravitational force, their bodies sinking, and their speed reduced drastically.

A cold light flashed in Yue Zhong’s eyes as he shot past Zheng Zhen.

"Fool!!"

Zheng Zhen waved his right fist and sent a fist at the speed of sound towards Yue Zhong.

Luo Qing Qing, who was still trembling on the ground, shouted, "Careful!"

A powerful sense of danger welled up in Yue Zhong’s mind, the right fist of Zheng Zhen was obviously unable to threaten him, it should not even be able to touch him.

However, his Danger Perception had saved him countless times, he twisted his body at the first instant, leaping to one side.

A grey light suddenly shot out of Zheng Zhen’s right hand, brushing past Yue Zhong’s chest, leaving behind a deep scar. It managed to brush past the Type 4 Mutant Beast hide, the Level 5 Defense Vest, causing Yue Zhong’s bones to be seen. Had he been slower, he would have been cleaved in two.

"He dodged it? What a terrifying reactive ability!" Zheng Zhen stared at Yue Zhong with a solemn gaze. This strike of his was able to tear most other Type 4 Divine Warriors in two.

Dao Ge had appeared behind Yue Zhong silently, a sharp dagger in his hands slashing towards Yue Zhong’s heart.

With the Dark Dou Qi powering his body, Yue Zhong pulled out his Flame Blade and slashed backward, accurately deflecting the dagger, before he sent out a kick at the speed of sound to slam into Dao Ge’s chest, sending him flying into a wall.

After Dao Ge was sent flying away, Zheng Zhen appeared in front of Yue Zhong, punching out once more.

Yue Zhong shot forwards, bringing his Flame Blade down like a meteor.

No matter how tough a human’s body was, it could not deflect the claw of a Type 4 Mutant Beast.

All of a sudden, a grey light burst out from Zheng Zhen’s fist, slamming into the Flame Blade, knocking it away forcefully.

The Flame Blade was knocked away, and Zheng Zhen saw Yue Zhong abandoning it, dashing in front of him, and punching his chest. He was sent flying into another wall.

Yue Zhong laughed lightly, "Weak! The Pterosaur King and Tyrannosaur King of Pterosaur Mountain are truly too weak!"

Zheng Zhen and Dao Ge were both Type 4 experts, relying on their own Pterosaur Battle Armor to reach the peak of the Type 4 stage, but their combat abilities were basically trash, compared to Luo Qing Qing. Yue Zhong could easily suppress the 2 of them through combat alone.

Obviously, the two of them had reached their levels by relying on the Blood Honey. They had not gotten better through countless battles, taking one step at a time to reach the top. In the past, they had used their might to suppress the enemies, which did not count for much. When meeting an opponent of the same level, their weakness in experience was immediately obvious.

Luo Qing Qing who was still on the ground gasping for breath looked at how easily Yue Zhong had subdued the two Type 4 experts of Pterosaur mountain and was filled with shock, "Strong! So he was actually holding back when battling me earlier!"

"I’m not playing anymore! Turn into ash for me!"

After defeating the two of them, with a tap of his foot, he appeared beside Dao Ge, his right hand ablaze with Devil Flames as he grabbed his head.

At that instant, the terrifying Devil Flames entered his body, erupting forcefully from within, turning him into a flaming person.

"Ah!!! Ah!!!"

Dao Ge began screaming in misery while struggling. However, within seconds, he was turned into a pile of ash, leaving behind the grey Pterosaur Battle Armor.

An unseen life force was absorbed into Yue Zhong’s body through the God and Devil Imprint.

"Strong!!"

"What a terrifying fellow!"

"Is that his true strength?"

"..."

Seeing Yue Zhong take down the 2 leaders of Pterosaur Mountain, and the Tyrannosaur King Dao Ge being incinerated in a flash, other than Luo Qing Qing, everyone else was shocked beyond words.

Especially the handsome Rokudo Bikuma, who was now pale and his body trembled. If Yue Zhong managed to succeed and saved Luo Qing Qing, his fate as a traitor would definitely be unimaginable.

Zheng Zhen’s gaze shrunk, as the grey color power in him began to emit out with more force. It turned into an energy that coursed through him, enlarging his muscles, and his face contorted. He suddenly broke through the Type 5 Divine Warrior realm, and a huge force burst out with him as the center, distorting even the air around him.

chapters.title: Chapter 819: Slaughtering Zheng Zhen!
chapters.body:
Chapter 819: Slaughtering Zheng Zhen!

Chapter 819: Slaughtering Zheng Zhen!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Zheng Zhen’s eyes flashed with a strange light as he tried to coax Yue Zhong once more, "Join me! As long as you join me, Luo Qing Qing, Liu Mei’er, they can all belong to you. I’ll give you half the women of Storm Valley, and we can become partners to rule Green Region. How about it?"

Zheng Zhen was filled with wariness and caution towards Yue Zhong. If he could get Yue Zhong on his side by splitting the rewards instead of fighting, it would be a better outcome. With Dao Ge’s death, it was not a bad thing, as now, the entire Pterosaur Mountain was his to command.

"Sorry, I’m not interested in dogs of the Dino-People."

Yue Zhong summoned his Dark Dou Qi, and his entire body was wrapped in it as he shot towards Zheng Zhen. In a breath, he had already appeared in front of him, his blade covered in Devil Flames as it swung down.

Zheng Zhen roared out in rage, as the power in him surged. He slapped out with his palm, as a sharp beam of grey light shot out towards Yue Zhong.

Yue Zhong’s expression fell. He swung the Flame Blade out at the grey light, forcefully shattering it.

As the few beams of light were destroyed by Yue Zhong, he was forced back a dozen meters, his right hand numb. There were traces of blood on his chest and shoulder. In the end, he was unable to fully deal with the grey light.

Yue Zhong gazed at Zheng Zhen solemnly, "A Type 5 Divine Warrior is truly terrifying, even if it’s a lousy one. The power can threaten my life!"

At the peak of Type 4 Divine Warrior, Zheng Zhen was suppressed by Yue Zhong. However, with the power of the Pterosaur Battle Armor, he was able to push his limits to the Type 5 realm, injuring Yue Zhong with a single fist.

"Hahaha!!! Yue Zhong, since you aren’t willing to be a dog, you can go to hell!!"

Zheng Zhen’s eyes turned bloodshot as his muscles went taut. With a single step, his strength was enough to create a ditch in the ground. Burrowing the power of the suit, he rushed up right in front of Yue Zhong, punching out with a force that could tear a tank into shreds.

Yue Zhong tapped his foot and retreated explosively, appearing behind Zheng Yun, sending a punch towards her chest.

Zheng Yun was currently embroiled with White Bones and was not prepared for Yue Zhong’s sneak attack. She could watch wide-eyed as Yue Zhong’s fist slammed into her chest, the terrifying strength sending her into a wall.

White Bones’ fiery demonic eyes shone, shooting in front of her, as it sent multiple bone spikes into her.

Having lost her weapons, Zheng Yun could only make use of her hands to break apart those bones spikes. However, countless more slammed into her, the force from the attacks bypassing her armor and shaking her internal organs up.

Liu Mei’er, who was still on the floor, covered in vines, pleaded, "Save me!! Burn these vines away, I can lend you a hand!!"

By this time, Liu Mei’er’s strength was ebbing away by the bloodsucking vine. She was now powerless and defenseless, but it could not change the fact that she was still a Type 4 Divine Warrior.

Yue Zhong glanced at her, without any intention of caring. This woman was vicious and cunning, seeking only her own interests. If he were to save her, she might not even help him, instead, choosing to run. After all, she had an enmity with Luo Qing Qing, and if Yue Zhong wanted to get the support of the entire Storm Valley, he would need Luo Qing Qing.

"Die! Die! Die!!"

Zheng Zhen’s eyes were bloodshot and his expression savage, his entire body looking ready to burst. He was like an enraged beast, the floor beneath his feet shattering with every step he took.

In an instant, Zheng Zhen appeared in front of Yue Zhong, his face cruel, his right hand blasting towards Yue Zhong with sharp, grey beams.

The sharp grey lights caused Yue Zhong to be torn apart, dissipating into dust.

Behind the crumbling Yue Zhong, his real body appeared suddenly, his blade covered in Devil Flames slashing towards Zheng Zhen.

Zheng Zhen had celebrated inwardly when he thought he had crushed Yue Zhong. Since he had borrowed the suit to enhance his realm to the Type 5 level, while he was filled with power, in exchange, his perception and reaction had been affected due to the pain. Therefore, he had not discovered that the one he had killed was Yue Zhong’s clone.

Facing Yue Zhong’s sudden strike, shock filled Zheng Zhen’s eyes, as he roared out in rage, the bright and sharp grey light bursting out from his body.

The radiance was too sudden, and Yue Zhong quickly reacted by enforcing the Flame Blade with Dark Dou Qi, causing the bright light to shatter.

"Strong!! A Type 5 Divine Warrior is truly a different stage compared to the Type 4 Divine Warriors!" As Yue Zhong slashed up the light, he was also forced back dozens of meters, his body riddled with new wounds.

Zheng Zhen was like a demon right now, not intending to give Yue Zhong any space to breathe. With a flash of his body, he appeared right in front of Yue Zhong, bringing countless grey light towards Yue Zhong.

Yue Zhong had no choice but to retreat further, waving the Flame Blade in front of him as he channeled the Dark Dou Qi through his body, shattering the grey light.

Zheng Zhen’s radiance was like an endless source of power, thundering down on Yue Zhong without any stop. Every single beam could cause a peak Type 4 Divine Warrior to be killed

Yue Zhong felt like a boat out on the stormy seas, being buffeted continuously with no means of counterattack, only defending as hard as he could. However, from time to time, some of the beams would manage to leave injuries on him.

"Ah!!!"

The intense battle continued for another 5 minutes when suddenly, Zheng Zhen let out a scream. The blood vessels in his body burst apart, as blood flowed everywhere, looking extremely horrifying.

Zheng Zhen’s true strength had only been at the initial Type 4 realm, he had no means of maintaining the Type 5 for long. Forcefully pushing it only caused him backlash if he could not deal with his enemy in time.

Seizing that chance, Yue Zhong shot forwards, swinging his blade and decapitating Zheng Zhen in one swift motion.

In a shower of blood, Zheng Zhen’s headless corpse slumped to the ground, while his life force was absorbed by Yue Zhong.

Yue Zhong glanced at the corpse and thought quietly, "A Type 5 is truly strong, even someone as trashy as him was almost able to kill me. Seems like to deal with a true powerhouse, with my current strength, I will still need the Sun Armor."

Yue Zhong had continued to drag out the fight in order to test his capabilities against a Type 5 Divine Warrior. After this battle, he had finally ascertained that the gap between him and a true Type 5 Divine Warrior was still large.

After all, most other races had physiques much stronger than humans, be it the Flesh-Eaters, Vampires, or Dino-people. They were all freaks and monsters, among similar ranks, they were able to suppress humans entirely. Yue Zhong was already pushed to his limits when dealing with a single Type 5 Zheng Zhen, against other true Type 5 Divine Warriors, it would spell death if he did not use the Sun Armor.

Luo Qing Qing watched Yue Zhong kill Zheng Zhen, and heaved a sigh of relief. At the same time, she eyed Yue Zhong warily. After all, she knew how just how vicious and merciless a leader could be to his or her enemies. She would not be naive to assume that Yue Zhong was some saint. After all, within this temple, only Liu Mei’er and she had the ability to contend with Yue Zhong. If he were to go back on his word, then the 2 beauties would be at his mercy.

Yue Zhong gazed at the half-kneeling Luo Qing Qing and spoke softly, "Luo Qing Qing, will you honor our agreement?"

A resolute look flashed past her eyes, "Of course, my words have always been worth its weight in gold!"

Yue Zhong asked, "What were you poisoned with?"

Her expression was one of being fatally poisoned, otherwise with her Type 4 Divine Warrior strength, most simple toxins would have been forced out by her.

Liu Mei’er suddenly quipped, "She’s been afflicted with a myriad of toxins, it’s a special concoction by me made of 7 different types of Mutant Plants. There’s only me in the whole wide world that knows how to detoxify it. Yue Zhong, as long as you help me deal with this damnable bloodsucking vine, I’m willing to become your woman and help you control Storm Valley. This woman, I can gift her to you as a toy. She’s the Storm Queen after all if you can dominate her, how exciting it would be."

Yue Zhong’s eyes flashed with a strange glint and he turned to look at Luo Qing Qing in an unbridled manner, a teasing smile on his face, "Luo Qing Qing, Liu Mei’er intends to give me the whole Storm Valley. What about you?"

Luo Qing Qing met his gaze without fear, her eyes one of resolution, "I can only give you what I promised. If you want me to submit, you will only gain a dead body."

"Good!" Yue Zhong laughed lightly, coming to Liu Mei’er and speaking coldly, "Hand over the antidote."

Her heart turned cold, knowing Yue Zhong’s choice. The hot look in her eyes faded away, as she turned to look at Luo Qing Qing with hatred and schadenfreude, "Luo Qing Qing, you may have won today. However, the 7-mix poison has no antidote. Even with all your abilities, you will have no way of recovering from this. You will become an ordinary person with no Strength, I want to see how you will continue to rule Storm Valley."

chapters.title: Chapter 820: Subjugating Liu Mei’Er!
chapters.body:
Chapter 820: Subjugating Liu Mei’Er!

Chapter 820: Subjugating Liu Mei’er!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Luo Qing Qing turned pale upon hearing those words, however, she recovered quickly, "Mei’er, even if I’ve lost my strength, it doesn’t matter. Even if I can’t stay as the Storm Queen of Storm Valley, I will still do my utmost for the sisters of Storm Valley."

Liu Mei’er looked Luo Qing Qing who still seemed so sure of herself, as though the loss of strength did not affect her, and her own eyes flashed with shame, and she closed her eyes, keeping quiet.

"7-mix poison eh?" Yue Zhong laughed lightly, before turning to Luo Qing Qing, "If I can help you absolve your poison, what would you do to repay me?"

Luo Qing Qing’s eyes brightened a flicker of hope flashing by. To an expert, losing their strength was a nightmare. If she could gain back her strength, she was willing to pay a high price.

She fell silent before replying, "5 Type 4 Nuclei! 10 Storm Battle Armor!"

5 Type 4 Nuclei and 10 Storm Battle Armors were a huge price, as long as one enough Type 3 Divine Warrior expert, making use of the Storm Battle Armor would grant Yue Zhong 5 Type 4 warriors.

Yue Zhong responded firmly, "No! I want the Storm 8 Greats, as long as you hand them over, I will cure your poison!"

The Storm 8 Greats were the most outstanding female generals of the Storm Valley, each one of them at the peak of Type 3 Divine Warrior. On top of that, each of them had powerful unique abilities. If he could gain their wholehearted help, he could expand his faction much faster.

Yue Zhong had obtained a whole lot of treasures from the Sun Alliance treasury, but he lacked human talents. While the Storm 8 Greats could not compare with Luo Qing Qing, they were still powerful experts. Yue Zhong naturally hoped to obtain their help.

Luo Qing Qing immediately emitted a frosty aura, as she stared coldly at Yue Zhong, "No! I refuse! I cannot send them to you just for my own benefits! They’re my friends and subordinates, not some gifts to be sent away!! Even if I were to be a cripple my whole life, I will not betray my friends and subordinates!!"

Yue Zhong eyed the resolute and upright Luo Qing Qing, his eyes flashing with appreciation.

She was not just a warlord, if it had been anyone else, in order to regain their strength, they would give up anything.

"Your Majesty! What’s going on!!"

Right at this moment, a lady with blonde hair and blue eyes, and an incredible body to boot came rushing in. She was wearing a green Storm Battle Armor, obviously one of the Storm 8 Greats. She was Hai Xi, and she had brought 16 other female warriors as they rushed in.

Hai Xi caught sight of the tragic scene in the temple, her heart turned cold. She wielded her Battle Spear and came in front of her, eyeing Yue Zhong dangerously.

The 16 other female warriors also raised their weapons, ready to attack.

Luo Qing Qing spoke up solemnly, "Stop, Hai Xi. This is Yue Zhong, the leader of the Vulture Valley. He’s not our enemy. Liu Mei’er had colluded with Pterosaur Mountain to bring their people in to incite a rebellion. Yue Zhong had acted to foil their plans. He’s our friend!"

Having seen Yue Zhong’s strength, Luo Qing Qing knew clearly that unless all the Storm 8 Greats worked together, they would not be able to defeat him. Even if they could defeat him, it would be impossible to kill him. She did not want to make an enemy out of such a character.

"Since you’re already safe, I’ll be making my move. Don’t forget our agreement."

Yue Zhong chuckled before lifting the incapacitated Liu Mei’er and heavily injured Zheng Yun with one hand while hoisting Willianna with the other, as he made his way out of the Imperial City.

Luo Qing Qing frowned at Liu Mei’er, before ordering one of the Storm Warriors, "Annie, go bring Yue Zhong to a guest room for a good rest."

"Yes!" Annie responded, before hurrying after Yue Zhong.

Yue Zhong and the rest left, while Luo Qing Qing’s icy gaze landed on Rokudo Bikuma.

His face was currently devoid of color, as he crawled towards Luo Qing Qing, "Your Majesty!! I… I had lost my mind!! Your Majesty, I… I was forced!! Yes!! I was forced!! Your Majesty!! It was Zheng Yun and Liu Mei’er who forced me!! They forced me!! I love you!!! Your Majesty!! I love only you!! Your Majesty!"

"This man and Yue Zhong are truly worlds apart!!"

Luo Qing Qing’s eyes flashed with disgust as she ordered mercilessly, "Hai Xi, kill him! Pass my command, all of the Rokudo Family will be slaves from now on!"

"Yes!" The gallant Hai Xi dashed forward, her spear thrusting towards Rokudo Bikuma’s neck, instantly decapitating him.

Seeing the head of Rokudo Bikuma soaring through the air, his expression one of shock, the few Storm Warriors beside Luo Qing Qing felt pity.

Rokudo Bikuma was good looking, and few men could compare to him. The women also liked good-looking guys, seeing such a looker being killed, they could not help but feel regret. After all, he was considered a Prince Charming in most of their fantasies.

After he was killed, the rest of the Storm Imperial City began to enforce Luo Qing Qing’s orders, many of Liu Mei’er’s close aids were rooted out, while the entire Rokudo Family was ruined.

"I didn’t expect you to be a Type 4 Divine Warrior! That’s great!! Come and show me some love!!"

The moment they entered the room, Willianna, who had been set free from her ropes, immediately pounced on Yue Zhong with desire, her body in heat, exuding an irresistible charm.

Yue Zhong looked at her and likewise felt aroused, kissing her roughly.
